description_long: This object is a long-barreled firearm with a classic design, featuring a dark metallic barrel and a wooden grip and receiver. The barrel is notably extended, cylindrical, and appears to be made of blued steel, giving it a sleek, polished look. The grip is ergonomically curved and constructed from a reddish-brown wood, smoothly finished and attached to a metallic frame. The trigger and trigger guard are prominent, with the guard being rounded and large enough to accommodate a gloved finger. The receiver section is metallic, matching the barrel in finish, and connects seamlessly to the wooden grip. The overall appearance suggests a historical or vintage style, suitable for display or use in period urban settings.
description: A long, vintage-style shotgun with a dark metal barrel and a polished wooden grip, featuring a rounded trigger guard and classic design elements.
description_view_0: The shotgun is viewed from the muzzle end, showing the circular barrel opening and a narrow profile.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the full length of the barrel, the wooden grip, and the rounded trigger guard.
description_view_2: The shotgun is seen from above, highlighting the length of the barrel and the smooth wooden grip.
description_view_3: The right side view displays the same features as the left, with clear visibility of the trigger and hammer.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long cylindrical barrel with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, elongated trigger guard with a smooth contour and ample space
